title: selago dregeana
intro: Selago dregeana, also known as Cape jayflower, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Selago dregeana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
